option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:background="?attr/colorPrimary">
<TextView android:text="Personal Finance" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content"/>
<TextView android:text="Companion" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content"/>
<TextView android:text="Track your money, achieve your goals" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Menu Grid --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Dashboard Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnDashboard" android:text="Dashboard\n\nView your balance, income & expenses" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Transactions Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnTransactions" android:text="Transactions\n\nAdd, edit & manage your entries" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/colorAccent" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Goals Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnGoals" android:text="Goals\n\nSet and track your savings goals" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/holo_green_dark" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Insights Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnInsights" android:text="Insights\n\nAnalyze your spending patterns" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/holo_orange_dark" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:background="?attr/colorPrimary">
<!-- Logo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/appLogo" android:layout_width="80dp" android:layout_height="80dp" android:src="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:contentDescription="App Logo" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:scaleType="centerInside"/>
<TextView android:text="Personal Finance" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content"/>
<TextView android:text="Companion" android:textSize="24sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content"/>
<TextView android:text="Track your money, achieve your goals" android:textSize="12sp" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Menu Grid --> <ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Dashboard Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnDashboard" android:text="Dashboard\n\nView your balance, income & expenses" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Transactions Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnTransactions" android:text="Transactions\n\nAdd, edit & manage your entries" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="?attr/colorAccent" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Goals Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnGoals" android:text="Goals\n\nSet and track your savings goals" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/holo_green_dark" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
<!-- Insights Button --> <androidx.cardview.widget.CardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="120dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="4dp">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnInsights" android:text="Insights\n\nAnalyze your spending patterns" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@android:color/holo_orange_dark" android:textColor="@android:color/white" style="?attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"/>
</androidx.cardview.widget.CardView>
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>
